methodology: Full source read of every layer source file + wrapper integration. Verified by grep for GTTelemetryWriter, emit_layer_event, __GT_STRUCTURED__, --structured-output across all runtime paths.

layers.name: Pre-Task Brief

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: V1RBriefResult dataclass (line 33) contains files: list[FileEntry] where FileEntry has path, score, functions, test_mappings, callees. V74BriefResult has ranked_full with per-file component scores.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: Wrapper line 2201 extracts out.brief_text (string only). V1RBriefResult object is discarded. No serialization of FileEntry list or v74 components.

gt_layer_event_emitted.evidence: Zero calls to GTTelemetryWriter.emit_layer_event() in v1r_brief.py or the wrapper brief generation path.

joinable_to_agent_reaction.evidence: _log_gt_interaction entry at line 2385 has no event_id. Correlated only by layer='L1' and iter=0.

rendered_text_is_sole_artifact.evidence: gt_sent in _log_gt_interaction contains the rendered brief text blob. No evidence_items[] or structured candidate list persisted.

what_is_persisted.telemetry_counter: GTTelemetry.record_brief(ok, l2_present) -> L1 ok/fail, L2 ok/fail

what_is_lost: Per-file retrieval scores (semantic, lexical, reach, anchor_prox components)
Whether cross-domain expansion (cochange/test_coimport) fired
Whether hub-suppression or modulus gate filtered candidates
v74.ranked_full list (all candidates with component scores)
v74.focus_set (diagnostic only, printed to stdout)
FileEntry.score per candidate

layers.name: Post-Edit Hook

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: _evidence_accumulator parameter (line 541) collects dicts with kind, file_path, symbol, line_start, text, source, reason. Kinds: l3_caller_code, l3_test_assertion, l3_signature, l3_sibling_pattern, l3_targeted_verification.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: Wrapper never passes --structured-output flag (grep confirms zero matches in oh_gt_full_wrapper.py). _evidence_accumulator is therefore always None in production. __GT_STRUCTURED__ sentinel at line 1493 never fires.

gt_layer_event_emitted.evidence: Zero calls to emit_layer_event() in post_edit.py or wrapper L3 path.

joinable_to_agent_reaction.evidence: _log_gt_interaction entry has no event_id. Multiple L3 fires per task share different iter values but no unique identifier for correlation.

rendered_text_is_sole_artifact.evidence: gt_sent = framing + hook_body_edit (rendered <gt-evidence> block). No evidence_items[] persisted.

what_is_lost: Which evidence families produced items vs were empty (caller, sibling, signature, test)
Per-caller file paths and code snippets as separate records
Confidence scores per evidence item
File classification (connected vs minimal)
Blast radius count as a structured field
Whether dynamic hop (thin wrapper follow) fired

layers.name: Post-View Hook

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: _evidence_accumulator parameter (line 190) collects dicts with kind, file_path, text, source, reason. Kinds: l3b_caller_edge, l3b_callee_edge, l3b_importer_edge.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: Same as L3: wrapper never passes --structured-output. _accum at line 416 is only populated when args.structured_output is True.

gt_layer_event_emitted.evidence: Zero calls to emit_layer_event() in post_view.py or wrapper L3b path.

joinable_to_agent_reaction.evidence: _log_gt_interaction entry at line 1613 has no event_id.

rendered_text_is_sole_artifact.evidence: gt_sent = hook_body (rendered navigation lines: 'Called by:', 'Calls into:', 'Imported by:').

what_is_lost: Visited-file dedup suppressions
Hub-penalized scores per neighbor
Issue-relevance scores per neighbor
Whether [CANDIDATE] annotation was applied
Whether iteration-aware decay reduced the limit

layers.name: Prefetch (gt_query evidence)

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: Builds list of string blocks from gt_query stdout. Tracks queries_run, total_lines, symbols as local variables. No typed evidence items.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: tel.record_l4_prefetch(queries_run, total_lines) records counters only. Rendered <gt-prefetch> block appended to brief, logged as part of L1 gt_sent.

joinable_to_agent_reaction.evidence: L4 output embedded in L1 brief text blob. No separate _log_gt_interaction call. Must parse <gt-prefetch> XML from gt_sent.

rendered_text_is_sole_artifact.evidence: The <gt-prefetch> XML block with embedded evidence lines and git precedent is the only output.

what_is_persisted.telemetry_counter: GTTelemetry.record_l4_prefetch(queries, lines) -> L4 ok count per query, skipped if 0
what_is_persisted.interaction_log: Embedded in L1 brief gt_sent (no separate entry)

what_is_lost: Per-symbol query results (which returned evidence, which empty)
Git precedent commit hashes and messages as structured fields
Wall time per individual query
Noise-pattern filtering decisions
Which lines were kept vs filtered

layers.name: Trajectory Governor

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: _log() method (line 318) constructs dict with timestamp, layer, hook, iter, max_iter, band, phase, fired, suppressed_reason, l5_messages_total, message_len, message_text, next_action.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: _log() writes to /tmp/gt_l5_telemetry.jsonl (line 338-342). Contains decision metadata + truncated message_text (500 chars). BUT: no event_id, no evidence_items[].

gt_layer_event_emitted.evidence: Zero calls to emit_layer_event() in governor.py.

joinable_to_agent_reaction.evidence: No event_id in telemetry entries. Wrapper _log_gt_interaction entries also lack event_id. Join only by approximate timestamp/iter.

rendered_text_is_sole_artifact.evidence: Decision metadata (hook name, band, fired, suppressed_reason) IS persisted. But evidence_items[] and FailureSnapshot NOT persisted.

what_is_persisted.dedicated_jsonl: /tmp/gt_l5_telemetry.jsonl with hook, iter, band, phase, fired, message_text[:500]

what_is_lost: FailureSnapshot struct (exception_type, expected/actual, top_project_frame)
L5TrajectoryState (edited_source_files list, verification history, failure chain)
Whether _injection_disabled was true and the disable reason
Full message text (truncated to 500 chars in telemetry)

layers.name: Safety Checker

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: L5bSafetyChecker.validate() returns (bool, str | None). Checks restart language, broad exploration, token cap.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: Class has no logging, no file output, no telemetry calls.

gt_layer_event_emitted.evidence: L5b valid layer in constants.py, EvidenceKind.L5B_INTERVENTION exists, but neither used.

joinable_to_agent_reaction.evidence: Never called in production. Nothing to join.

rendered_text_is_sole_artifact.evidence: No artifact at all. Dead code.

what_is_lost: L5b safety validation was designed to gate L5 messages before emission
Restart-language suppression, broad-exploration-late suppression, token cap enforcement
All checks never applied to L5 governor messages in production

layers.name: Reindex

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: Wrapper computes exit_code, mtime_before, mtime_after, r_ok. Local variables not persisted as structured fields.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: tel_obj.record_reindex(r_ok) records ok/fail counter only. _log_gt_interaction records gt_sent=reindex_out[:200] (truncated).

joinable_to_agent_reaction.evidence: _log_gt_interaction entry has no event_id. Filterable by layer='L6' + iter.

rendered_text_is_sole_artifact.evidence: gt_sent is first 200 chars of gt-index binary output.

what_is_lost: Number of new/updated nodes and edges after reindex
Whether edited file gained new callers/callees in graph
Before/after comparison of graph state for edited file
Full gt-index output (truncated to 200 chars)

layers.name: Scaffold Stripping

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: _strip_scaffold_files computes to_strip (list) and kept (list). Local variables.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: No _log_gt_interaction call. No GTTelemetry counter. Only stdout: 'GT_ENFORCE: Stripping N scaffold files'.

gt_layer_event_emitted.evidence: HYGIENE valid layer, EvidenceKind.HYGIENE_STRIP exists, neither used.

what_is_persisted.stdout_only: GT_ENFORCE: Stripping N scaffold files / Kept N non-scaffold files

what_is_lost: List of stripped scaffold files (names and paths)
List of kept non-scaffold files
Whether stripping occurred before or after final diff

layers.name: Interaction Logging

produces_structured_data_internally.evidence: Constructs dict with timestamp, iter, layer, trigger, type, gt_sent, gt_sent_bytes, gt_sent_tokens, has_real_evidence, agent_action_before, agent_action_after.

structured_data_persisted_to_jsonl.evidence: Written to /tmp/gt_meta_{id}.jsonl and /tmp/gt_interactions_{id}.jsonl. Also pushed to instance_ref.

gt_layer_event_emitted.evidence: Uses its own ad-hoc schema, not GTLayerEvent. No event_id field.

joinable_to_agent_reaction.evidence: No event_id. Two injections in same iter not disambiguable. agent_action_after backfill is best-effort (gaps when next action triggers no GT).

rendered_text_is_sole_artifact.evidence: gt_sent is rendered text blob. No evidence_items[]. Must parse string to determine evidence content.

broken_reasons: No event_id — two GT injections in same iteration cannot be disambiguated
No evidence_items[] — must parse rendered gt_sent string to extract evidence
Incompatible with GTLayerEvent schema (different field set, no shared identifiers)
agent_action_after backfill is best-effort — gaps when next agent action triggers no GT layer

telemetry_schemas.status: defined but never instantiated in any runtime path

telemetry_writer.status: defined but never instantiated in any runtime path

telemetry_constants.status: imported by schemas.py but constants never consumed by runtime code

l5b_safety_checker.status: defined but validate() never called from governor or wrapper

gap_to_close.description: To move from current state to IMPLEMENTED_STRUCTURED for all layers:
steps: 1. Instantiate GTTelemetryWriter in the wrapper (once per task, pass to all layer calls)
2. L1: Serialize V1RBriefResult.files as evidence_items[] in a GTLayerEvent before discarding the object
3. L3: Pass --structured-output when invoking post_edit.py OR refactor to import directly and capture _evidence_accumulator
4. L3b: Same as L3 — pass --structured-output or import directly
5. L4: Create EvidenceItem per gt_query result and per git precedent entry
6. L5: Replace _log() with emit_layer_event() using GTLayerEvent, include FailureSnapshot as evidence_items
7. L5b: Wire L5bSafetyChecker.validate() into governor before emitting L5 messages
8. L6: Emit GTLayerEvent with reindex stats (new nodes, new edges, mtime delta)
9. HYGIENE: Emit GTLayerEvent with stripped file list
10. META: Add event_id to _log_gt_interaction OR replace with GTLayerEvent references
